prompt: When configuring the Simplified Change Management Normal change model, what does the Available for new change requests setting control?
choices: Whether the Normal model appears in the change type picker when creating new change requests
Whether Resolved incidents auto-close after the glide.ui.autoclose.time interval
Whether catalog items require manager approval before fulfillment
Whether problem records skip the Assess state automatically
explanation: The Availability setting on the Normal change model controls whether users can select Normal when creating a new change request in Simplified Change Management.

prompt: What can administrators configure in the Simplified Change Management Emergency change model?
choices: Software license compliance counter schedules only
Authorized submitters, stakeholder notifications, approvals, and automatic change task creation
The default variable editor formatter on catalog requested items only
Service portfolio taxonomy layers without change approvals
explanation: The Emergency change model configuration console defines who may submit emergency changes, notifications, approvals, and automatic task creation behavior.

prompt: In Simplified Change Management, how do requesters typically create Standard changes?
choices: By converting open incidents to Emergency changes from the incident form
By manually running the Autoclose Incidents scheduled job for each request
By selecting a pre-defined Standard change template rather than using the change type picker
By submitting a record producer that creates Problem records instead of changes
explanation: Standard changes are pre-approved and accessed through templates; requesters choose a template to create the change rather than picking Standard from the change type picker.

prompt: A customer wants users to copy existing change requests and include the Work Notes List field in the copied record. Which approach aligns with proven Change Management configuration practices?
choices: Modify the Copy Change UI Action script without updating any change properties
Set Enable Copy Change feature (com.snc.change_request.enable_copy) to true and add work_notes_list to com.snc.change_request.copy.attributes
Override Dictionary attributes on the Problem table to set Include in Record Copy
Disable all ACLs on the change_request table for every role
explanation: Copy change behavior is controlled through Change Properties, including enable copy and the comma-separated list of attributes copied from the originating change.

prompt: Which system property specifies the related lists copied when a change request is copied?
choices: com.snc.change_request.copy.related_lists
com.snc.incident.autoclose.basedon.resolved_at
glide.ui.autoclose.time
problem.duplicate.records_to_move
explanation: com.snc.change_request.copy.related_lists controls copying of default related lists such as Affected CIs, Impacted Services/CIs, and Change Tasks.
